case_title: ALAN MOSS VS. COURTNEY WALLER TURPIN ET AL

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS CAROL TURPEN AND COURTNEY TURPEN'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO ATTEND AND TESTIFY AT DEPOSITION AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART. THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFER AND AGREE UPON DEPOSITION DATES. MR. FEENEY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 AND SEND IT TO JPT MEAD FOR REVIEW & SIGNATURE. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROGER MEAD, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2018 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2018 Continued To Jul-31-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Attend And Testify At Deposition Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan Moss, plaintiff, appearing by CourtCall.
Thomas Feeney, Esq. of CARBONE, Tel. No. 510.267.7273, appearing for Turpen Defendants.

Both parties stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

Ruling - Argument held, matter submitted by counsel. At the conclusion of argument, Defendants Carol Turpen and Courtney Turpen's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Attend And Testify At Deposition Award Of Monetary Sanctions is granted in part. The Court and counsel confer and agree upon deposition dates. Mr. Feeney is to prepare a form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and send it to JPT Mead for review & signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT/HK)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Continued To Mar-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by or on behalf of Plaintiff. Thomas Fenney, Esq., appearing for Defendant. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is extended through February 12, 2018. The Arbitration OSC is re-set to March 27, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
